metadata.note: Recorded by the experimenter. Texts used verbatim; regeneration only on format failures (see Appendix B 4).

causal_texts: The glass slipped from Alice's hand. The glass fell to the floor. The glass broke into many pieces. The glass left a wet stain on the tile floor.
The snowball rolled down the steep hill. The snowball gathered more snow along the way. The snowball grew to the size of a boulder. The snowball crashed into a wooden fence at the bottom.
The candle burned slowly through the night. The candle melted into a pool of warm wax. The candle flickered one last time. The candle went out in the early morning.
The river rose after the heavy rain. The river overflowed beyond the muddy banks. The river flooded the nearby farmland. The river destroyed several crops in the low valley.
The boy climbed the tall oak tree. The boy reached the highest branch. The boy lost grip on the slippery bark. The boy fell into a pile of dry leaves below.
The balloon floated up from the small hand. The balloon drifted high over the rooftops. The balloon caught on a sharp tree branch. The balloon burst with a loud pop.
The old bridge cracked under the heavy truck. The old bridge split down the middle. The old bridge collapsed into the river below. The old bridge blocked the flow of water completely.
The egg rolled off the kitchen table. The egg fell toward the hard floor. The egg cracked open on impact. The egg spilled yellow yolk across the white tiles.
The kite caught a strong gust of wind. The kite soared high above the open park. The kite snapped free from the string. The kite disappeared behind the distant trees.
The match struck against the rough box. The match produced a small orange flame. The match lit the dry kindling in the fireplace. The match burned down to the fingertips.
The cat jumped onto the kitchen counter. The cat knocked a glass jar off the edge. The cat panicked at the loud crashing sound. The cat fled through the open window.
The car skidded on the icy road. The car spun around twice. The car slammed into a metal guardrail. The car came to a stop in a shallow ditch.
The dog dug a deep hole in the garden. The dog found an old buried bone. The dog carried the bone to the front porch. The dog chewed the bone for the rest of the afternoon.
The storm gathered dark clouds over the village. The storm brought powerful winds and heavy rain. The storm tore several branches off the trees. The storm left a trail of damage along the road.
The fire started in the dry underbrush. The fire spread quickly through the forest. The fire consumed several acres of woodland. The fire left only charred stumps and gray ash.
The boat hit a large rock below the surface. The boat cracked along the wooden hull. The boat took on cold water rapidly. The boat sank to the bottom of the shallow lake.
The bird spotted a worm in the wet soil. The bird swooped down from the fence post. The bird grabbed the worm with a sharp beak. The bird flew back to the nest with the worm.
The tree swayed in the powerful windstorm. The tree cracked at the base of the trunk. The tree fell across the narrow road. The tree crushed a parked car underneath.
The rock tumbled off the steep cliff. The rock bounced against the jagged slope. The rock shattered into smaller fragments. The rock scattered gravel across the trail below.
The ball bounced off the brick wall. The ball rolled across the empty parking lot. The ball dropped into a storm drain. The ball floated away in the underground stream.
The letter slid off the pile on the desk. The letter fell behind the heavy filing cabinet. The letter sat hidden in the dust for weeks. The letter turned yellow at the edges from neglect.
The package arrived at the front door. The package sat in the rain for several hours. The package absorbed water through the thin cardboard. The package fell apart on the wet porch.
The coin slipped out of the torn pocket. The coin bounced on the stone sidewalk. The coin rolled toward the metal grate. The coin dropped into the dark sewer below.
The leaf broke free from the maple tree. The leaf drifted slowly through the cool air. The leaf landed on the surface of the pond. The leaf floated gently toward the far shore.
The book fell off the tall shelf. The book knocked over a small ceramic figurine. The book landed open on the hardwood floor. The book bent several pages in the fall.
The rope stretched under the heavy weight. The rope frayed at the weakest point. The rope snapped with a loud crack. The rope dropped the cargo onto the ground.
The nail loosened in the old wooden beam. The nail slid out during the strong earthquake. The nail dropped onto the dusty floor. The nail left a small round hole in the beam.
The wheel hit a deep pothole in the road. The wheel cracked along the metal rim. The wheel wobbled and pulled the car sideways. The wheel broke off near the intersection.
The door swung open in the strong wind. The door slammed against the inside wall. The door cracked the plaster behind the handle. The door bounced back and closed with a bang.
The window shattered from the impact of a baseball. The window sent glass shards across the living room. The window let cold air rush into the house. The window left a jagged frame of broken edges.
The roof weakened after years of water damage. The roof sagged in the middle section. The roof cracked under the weight of fresh snow. The roof caved in over the living room.
The pipe froze during the cold winter night. The pipe expanded from the pressure of the ice. The pipe burst open at a weak joint. The pipe flooded the basement with icy water.
The chain rusted after months of outdoor exposure. The chain weakened at several corroded links. The chain broke under the strain of the load. The chain dropped the heavy anchor into the harbor.
The seed fell into a patch of moist soil. The seed absorbed water through the outer shell. The seed sprouted a tiny green shoot. The seed grew into a small plant within weeks.
The flower bloomed in the warm spring sun. The flower opened wide colorful petals. The flower attracted dozens of bees to the garden. The flower dropped dry petals onto the ground.
The cake rose steadily inside the hot oven. The cake turned golden brown on the top. The cake cracked down the center from the heat. The cake collapsed after the oven door opened too early.
The paint can tipped over on the scaffold. The paint spilled across the wooden planks. The paint dripped down onto the clean sidewalk. The paint stained the concrete a bright shade of blue.

The ink bottle fell off the cluttered desk. The ink bottle shattered on the hard tile floor. The ink bottle spilled dark liquid across the surface. The ink bottle stained a nearby stack of white papers.

The paper airplane sailed out the classroom window. The paper airplane caught an updraft of warm air. The paper airplane glided over the school parking lot. The paper airplane landed on the roof of the gymnasium.
The pencil rolled to the edge of the desk. The pencil fell off and hit the hard floor. The pencil snapped in two at the middle. The pencil left a graphite mark on the tile.
The shoe came untied during the long race. The shoe slipped off at the final turn. The shoe tumbled onto the gravel track. The shoe tripped the runner in the neighboring lane.
The hat blew off in the sudden gust. The hat tumbled along the sandy beach. The hat rolled into the shallow waves. The hat drifted out beyond the breaking surf.
The key stuck inside the rusty lock. The key bent under too much force. The key snapped off at the narrow neck. The key left a broken piece jammed in the lock.
The log caught fire in the stone fireplace. The log crackled and popped loudly. The log split apart from the intense heat. The log crumbled into a pile of glowing embers.
The ice cracked on the surface of the frozen pond. The ice split into several large pieces. The ice shifted apart under the warm afternoon sun. The ice revealed the dark water underneath.

The sand castle stood near the water's edge. The sand castle weakened from the rising tide. The sand castle crumbled as waves reached the base. The sand castle dissolved into a flat mound of wet sand.
The wave formed far out in the deep ocean. The wave grew taller near the shallow coastline. The wave curled over and crashed onto the sandy beach. The wave pulled loose sand back into the foamy sea.
The cloud darkened over the dry farmland. The cloud released a sudden downpour of rain. The cloud drenched the freshly plowed fields below. The cloud moved eastward and left a faint rainbow behind.
The lightning struck the tallest pine tree. The lightning split the trunk in half. The lightning set the dry branches on fire. The lightning left a black scar down the side of the tree.
The arrow left the bow at high speed. The arrow sailed across the wide open field. The arrow hit the wooden target dead center. The arrow lodged deep into the painted board.
The stone skipped across the calm lake surface. The stone bounced five times on the still water. The stone slowed near the middle of the lake. The stone sank below the surface without a sound.
The plate slid off the wet tray. The plate crashed onto the restaurant floor. The plate broke into a dozen sharp pieces. The plate scattered food across the dining area.
The cup teetered on the edge of the shelf. The cup fell onto the counter below. The cup chipped along the ceramic rim. The cup spilled cold coffee across the counter.
The bottle rolled off the picnic table. The bottle hit a rock on the ground. The bottle cracked near the bottom edge. The bottle leaked red juice onto the grass.
The tire blew out on the busy highway. The tire shredded into long strips of rubber. The tire caused the truck to swerve sharply. The tire left black marks across the asphalt.
The engine overheated on the steep mountain road. The engine released a cloud of white steam. The engine seized up and stopped running. The engine cracked the radiator from the extreme heat.
The fence weakened from years of harsh weather. The fence leaned to one side in the wind. The fence snapped at the base of the posts. The fence fell across the narrow footpath.
The gate rusted shut over the long winter. The gate refused to budge when pushed hard. The gate cracked at the old iron hinges. The gate fell forward onto the stone walkway.
The sign loosened from the brick building. The sign swung back and forth in the wind. The sign broke free from the last bolt. The sign crashed onto the empty sidewalk below.
The lamp toppled off the bedside table. The lamp pulled the cord from the wall socket. The lamp cracked the ceramic base on the floor. The lamp left the entire bedroom in total darkness.
The bulb flickered in the overhead light fixture. The bulb buzzed with a faint electrical hum. The bulb flashed bright white one final time. The bulb went dark with a burnt smell.
The bell rang loudly in the old church tower. The bell startled a flock of roosting pigeons. The bell echoed across the quiet village square. The bell vibrated for several minutes after the strike.
The drum fell off the back of the parade float. The drum bounced twice on the paved street. The drum rolled into a crowd of spectators. The drum came to rest against a metal barricade.
The flag caught a powerful gust of wind. The flag tore away from the metal pole. The flag flew over the schoolyard fence. The flag landed in a muddy puddle across the street.

The sail ripped during the violent ocean storm. The sail flapped wildly against the wooden mast. The sail tangled around the rigging of the boat. The sail dragged the vessel sideways through rough waves.
The anchor dropped into the deep harbor water. The anchor sank quickly through the murky depths. The anchor hit the soft muddy bottom. The anchor held the fishing boat firmly in place.
The net spread wide across the forest trail. The net caught a wild rabbit by the legs. The net tightened as the rabbit struggled hard. The net held the rabbit until the trapper arrived.
The trap snapped shut on the wooden porch. The trap caught a small gray mouse inside. The trap rattled across the floor from the struggle. The trap came to rest against the kitchen wall.
The spring compressed under the heavy metal plate. The spring bent slightly beyond the normal limit. The spring snapped and launched the plate upward. The spring broke into two twisted metal pieces.

The dam cracked under the pressure of floodwater. The dam leaked streams of water through the cracks. The dam buckled outward at the weakest section. The dam broke apart and released a massive wall of water.
The tower swayed during the powerful earthquake. The tower cracked along the concrete foundation. The tower tilted sharply toward the east side. The tower crumbled into a massive cloud of dust.

The statue toppled from the marble pedestal. The statue tumbled down the wide stone steps. The statue smashed apart on the courtyard pavement. The statue scattered bronze fragments across the open plaza.
The vase wobbled on the narrow shelf. The vase tipped forward from a slight vibration. The vase fell onto the hardwood floor below. The vase shattered into hundreds of ceramic pieces.

The mirror cracked from a sudden change in temperature. The mirror split into a web of fine lines. The mirror dropped a large triangular shard onto the floor. The mirror left a bare spot on the bathroom wall.

The curtain caught fire from the open candle flame. The curtain burned rapidly up toward the curtain rod. The curtain dropped flaming fabric onto the carpet. The curtain set the entire living room ablaze.
The lid popped off the overheated pressure cooker. The lid flew upward and hit the kitchen ceiling. The lid dented the white plaster above the stove. The lid clattered down onto the tile floor.
The cork shot out of the champagne bottle. The cork flew across the crowded dining room. The cork hit a crystal chandelier above the table. The cork bounced off and landed inside a soup bowl.
The plug slipped out of the old bathtub drain. The plug rolled across the wet bathroom floor. The plug bounced off the wall near the door. The plug came to rest behind the wooden cabinet.

The switch flipped during the sudden power surge. The switch sent a jolt through the building's wiring. The switch tripped the main circuit breaker downstairs. The switch cut electricity to the entire first floor.
The lever jammed in the down position. The lever locked the heavy metal gate shut. The lever bent from excessive force by the worker. The lever snapped off at the rusted base.
The pedal stuck on the old bicycle. The pedal locked the rear wheel in place. The pedal threw the rider over the handlebars. The pedal broke off and fell onto the gravel path.
The gear slipped inside the antique clock. The gear jammed against a neighboring metal wheel. The gear ground down several small brass teeth. The gear brought the entire clock to a halt.
The blade hit a buried stone in the field. The blade chipped along the sharpened steel edge. The blade bent out of proper alignment. The blade left an uneven furrow in the dark soil.
The needle snagged on the thick wool fabric. The needle bent at a sharp angle. The needle broke near the tiny metal eye. The needle left a broken piece of steel in the cloth.

The thread tangled inside the sewing machine. The thread jammed the bobbin mechanism underneath. The thread caused the needle to skip several stitches. The thread ruined the straight seam on the blue dress.
The button popped off the heavy winter coat. The button bounced across the wooden floor. The button rolled under the tall bookcase. The button remained lost for the rest of the season.
The zipper caught on the jacket lining. The zipper jammed halfway up the front. The zipper tore the thin fabric along the teeth. The zipper broke apart at the metal slider.
The latch rusted on the old garden gate. The latch refused to open after the rain. The latch broke when the farmer pushed hard. The latch fell off and landed in the flower bed.
The hinge creaked on the heavy cellar door. The hinge loosened from the wooden frame. The hinge dropped one rusty screw onto the step. The hinge let the door swing freely off balance.
The bolt slid out of the crumbling brick wall. The bolt dropped onto the stone walkway below. The bolt released the iron railing from the wall. The bolt left a dangerous gap near the staircase.
The screw worked loose inside the wooden chair. The screw let the chair leg wobble badly. The screw fell out and rolled across the floor. The screw left the chair unstable and crooked.
The puppy chewed through the leather leash. The puppy escaped from the front yard. The puppy ran across the busy neighborhood street. The puppy hid under a porch three houses away.
The kettle boiled on the hot stove. The kettle released a loud whistle of steam. The kettle rattled against the iron burner grate. The kettle spilled hot water onto the stovetop.
The cyclist hit a patch of loose gravel. The cyclist lost control of the handlebars. The cyclist swerved off the narrow trail. The cyclist tumbled into a shallow grassy ditch.
The fisherman cast a line into the deep river. The fisherman hooked a large silver trout. The fisherman struggled against the pull of the fish. The fisherman pulled the trout onto the muddy bank.
The mechanic tightened the loose engine bolt. The mechanic tested the motor at full speed. The mechanic noticed a strange rattling noise. The mechanic discovered a cracked cylinder head underneath.
The baker mixed flour and eggs in a large bowl. The baker poured the batter into a round tin pan. The baker placed the pan inside the hot brick oven. The baker pulled out a perfectly golden loaf.

The painter applied a coat of red paint to the wall. The painter noticed a large crack in the plaster. The painter filled the crack with fresh white putty. The painter smoothed the surface with a flat metal blade.

The child stacked wooden blocks into a tall tower. The child placed one final block on the very top. The child bumped the table with a careless elbow. The child watched the tower collapse onto the carpet.
The squirrel climbed the bird feeder pole. The squirrel pried open the small wooden lid. The squirrel stuffed sunflower seeds into both cheeks. The squirrel jumped down and scurried across the lawn.
noncausal_texts: The town library lent a heavy atlas. The town library hosted a chess tournament. The town library displayed old photographs. The town library received a donated wooden shelf.

The village school organized a science fair. The village school planted oak trees along the entrance path. The village school repaired the old gymnasium floor. The village school purchased new maps for the geography room.

The corner bakery sold fresh rye bread on market day. The corner bakery replaced the front window awning. The corner bakery donated leftover pastries to the shelter. The corner bakery hired a second morning baker.

The neighborhood park installed a new water fountain. The neighborhood park hosted a kite flying contest. The neighborhood park repainted all the wooden benches green. The neighborhood park removed a dead elm tree near the pond.

The old museum acquired a rare Egyptian vase. The old museum repaired a leak in the west wing roof. The old museum offered free admission for local students. The old museum installed brighter lighting in the main hall.

The family farm grew sweet corn in the north field. The family farm built a new red wooden barn. The family farm sold goat cheese at the local market. The family farm adopted two stray cats from the road.

The city hospital trained twelve new emergency room nurses. The city hospital replaced the elevator on the third floor. The city hospital planted a small garden on the rooftop. The city hospital received a large shipment of medical supplies.

The lakeside cabin stored firewood under the front porch. The lakeside cabin needed a new coat of brown paint. The lakeside cabin sheltered a family of raccoons one winter. The lakeside cabin lost two roof shingles in a windstorm.

The downtown theater staged a comedy about pirates. The downtown theater replaced worn red velvet seats. The downtown theater hired a new lighting technician. The downtown theater sold popcorn from a vintage brass cart.

The harbor restaurant served grilled lobster on the patio. The harbor restaurant hung old fishing nets on the walls. The harbor restaurant won an award for clam chowder. The harbor restaurant fixed a broken window in the kitchen.

The country church collected blankets for the winter drive. The country church replaced cracked stones in the front walkway. The country church stored old hymn books in the basement. The country church planted roses along the iron fence.

The central post office delivered a large crate to the farm. The central post office lost a small brown envelope. The central post office installed a second mailbox outside. The central post office hired a new afternoon clerk.

The local fire station washed the big red engine. The local fire station rescued a kitten from a storm drain. The local fire station replaced the broken garage door. The local fire station accepted a donation of bottled water.

The fishing village exported salted cod to the mainland. The fishing village built a stone seawall along the harbor. The fishing village celebrated a festival with music and dance. The fishing village opened a small maritime history exhibit.

The bookshop owner ordered rare novels from overseas. The bookshop owner repainted the front door bright yellow. The bookshop owner organized a poetry reading in the back room. The bookshop owner fixed a squeaky floorboard near the counter.

The mountain lodge replaced the roof after a heavy snowfall. The mountain lodge hosted a wildlife photography workshop. The mountain lodge installed a wood-burning stove in the lobby. The mountain lodge donated old blankets to a nearby shelter.

The seaside hotel repainted the lobby walls a soft blue. The seaside hotel replaced the swimming pool filter system. The seaside hotel added a breakfast buffet for summer guests. The seaside hotel hung landscape paintings in the main hallway.

The art gallery featured a collection of bronze sculptures. The art gallery repaired a water-stained ceiling panel. The art gallery sold a landscape painting to a private collector. The art gallery hosted a reception for local artists.

The community center offered a free cooking class. The community center replaced the basketball court flooring. The community center installed a new projector in the meeting room. The community center collected canned food for the holiday drive.

The general store received a shipment of wool socks. The general store repaired the old brass cash register. The general store donated canned goods to the food bank. The general store hung a new wooden sign above the front door.

The public swimming pool hosted a charity relay race. The public swimming pool replaced the old diving board. The public swimming pool hired a new afternoon lifeguard. The public swimming pool installed a tall metal fence around the area.

The train station sold vintage travel posters at auction. The train station repaired a broken clock on the platform. The train station added a coffee stand near the main entrance. The train station planted flower boxes along the ticket windows.

The university dormitory replaced the hot water heater. The university dormitory installed new fire alarms on each floor. The university dormitory painted the common room walls bright white. The university dormitory donated old furniture to a charity shop.

The zoo repaired the wooden fence around the elephant area. The zoo acquired a pair of red pandas from overseas. The zoo installed new benches along the main visitor path. The zoo sold handmade postcards at the front entrance.

The flower shop arranged a large wedding bouquet of white roses. The flower shop replaced the front display window. The flower shop donated potted plants to the senior center. The flower shop received a delivery of tropical orchids.

The lighthouse keeper repaired a cracked window on the top floor. The lighthouse keeper painted the railing around the observation deck. The lighthouse keeper found an old coin near the rocky shore. The lighthouse keeper replaced the worn welcome mat at the door.

The blacksmith forged a set of iron horseshoes. The blacksmith mended a broken garden gate for a neighbor. The blacksmith sharpened a dull ax for the woodcutter. The blacksmith built a decorative iron candle holder.

The carpenter built a sturdy oak bookcase. The carpenter sanded the rough edges of a pine table. The carpenter replaced a broken stair railing in the house. The carpenter carved a small wooden bird for a friend.

The pottery studio fired a batch of clay bowls in the kiln. The pottery studio offered a weekend glazing workshop. The pottery studio displayed student artwork in the front window. The pottery studio purchased a new electric kiln.

The orchard produced a large harvest of green apples. The orchard repaired the wooden fence along the south border. The orchard built a small cider press inside the barn. The orchard sold baskets of peaches at a roadside stand.

The tailor mended a torn sleeve on a wool jacket. The tailor ordered a bolt of blue silk fabric. The tailor hemmed a pair of linen trousers for a customer. The tailor replaced the broken needle on the sewing machine.

The clockmaker repaired a damaged spring inside an antique watch. The clockmaker polished a brass grandfather clock case. The clockmaker replaced a cracked glass face on a wall clock. The clockmaker carved a new wooden cuckoo for an old clock.

The dentist filled a small cavity in a back molar. The dentist cleaned the waiting room carpet after a spill. The dentist purchased a new set of examination tools. The dentist hung a nature photograph in the hallway.

The optician fitted new lenses into a silver metal frame. The optician cleaned the glass display cases in the shop. The optician ordered a shipment of designer sunglasses. The optician repaired a broken hinge on a pair of reading glasses.

The jeweler polished a silver ring for a customer. The jeweler replaced a missing stone in a gold brooch. The jeweler cleaned the front display window of the shop. The jeweler engraved initials on a brass pocket watch.

The cobbler resoled a pair of worn leather boots. The cobbler replaced a broken buckle on a dress shoe. The cobbler stitched a torn strap on a brown sandal. The cobbler polished a pair of black oxford shoes.

The florist arranged sunflowers in a tall glass vase. The florist wrapped a bundle of lavender in brown paper. The florist watered the potted ferns near the shop entrance. The florist trimmed thorns off a bunch of red roses.

The beekeeper collected honey from the largest hive. The beekeeper repaired a cracked wooden hive frame. The beekeeper planted wildflowers near the apiary fence. The beekeeper built a new hive stand from cedar planks.

The weaver spun a length of soft gray yarn. The weaver repaired a broken loom pedal in the studio. The weaver dyed a batch of cotton thread deep indigo. The weaver hung a finished tapestry on the studio wall.

The glassblower shaped a delicate blue vase at the furnace. The glassblower repaired a cracked furnace door. The glassblower sold a set of goblets to a restaurant. The glassblower taught a beginner class for local students.

The watchmaker oiled the gears of an antique pocket watch. The watchmaker engraved a name on the back of a silver case. The watchmaker replaced a cracked crystal face on a wristwatch. The watchmaker wound a grandfather clock in the display window.

The cheese maker aged a wheel of cheddar in the cellar. The cheese maker purchased fresh milk from a nearby dairy farm. The cheese maker wrapped a block of gouda in red wax. The cheese maker entered a sample of brie in a regional contest.

The candle maker poured warm beeswax into copper molds. The candle maker twisted cotton wicks for a new batch. The candle maker packaged lavender candles in small tin boxes. The candle maker donated scented candles to the holiday bazaar.

The stone mason carved a new headstone from gray granite. The stone mason repaired a crumbling section of the garden wall. The stone mason smoothed the surface of a marble countertop. The stone mason chiseled a name into the cornerstone of the building.

The violin maker shaped a spruce wood soundboard by hand. The violin maker replaced a worn chin rest on an old instrument. The violin maker strung a new set of silver strings on a viola. The violin maker applied a coat of amber varnish to a cello.

The hat maker trimmed a felt brim with satin ribbon. The hat maker blocked a wool fedora on a wooden form. The hat maker stitched a silk lining into a tall top hat. The hat maker steamed the wrinkles out of a straw sun hat.

The brewer fermented a batch of dark ale in oak barrels. The brewer cleaned the copper brewing kettles in the back room. The brewer ordered fresh hops from a coastal farm. The brewer labeled glass bottles for the autumn festival.

The quilter sewed a patchwork blanket from cotton scraps. The quilter repaired a torn seam in an old family quilt. The quilter cut fabric squares for a new winter project. The quilter donated a finished quilt to the community raffle.

The mapmaker drew a chart of the northern coastline. The mapmaker corrected an error on a regional road map. The mapmaker labeled mountain peaks on an old topographic sheet. The mapmaker sold a hand-colored globe to a private collector.

The gardener pruned the rose bushes along the stone path. The gardener planted tulip bulbs in the east flower bed. The gardener repaired the wooden trellis near the garden wall. The gardener cleared fallen leaves from the gravel walkway.

The shepherd mended a torn section of the wire fence. The shepherd sheared wool from the oldest ewe in the flock. The shepherd trained a young border collie on the hillside. The shepherd carried a newborn lamb to the warm barn.

The janitor mopped the hallway floor on the second level. The janitor replaced a burned-out bulb in the stairwell. The janitor fixed a dripping faucet in the restroom. The janitor emptied the recycling bins near the main entrance.

The pianist practiced a nocturne in the rehearsal room. The pianist tuned the grand piano on the concert stage. The pianist signed a program for a young fan at the hall. The pianist purchased new sheet music from the downtown shop.

The pilot landed a small plane at the rural airstrip. The pilot inspected the left engine after a long flight. The pilot filed a report about turbulence over the mountains. The pilot cleaned the cockpit windshield with a soft cloth.

The diver explored a coral reef off the southern coast. The diver recovered a barnacle-covered anchor from the seabed. The diver photographed a school of tropical fish near the rocks. The diver repaired a torn seam in a rubber wetsuit.

The architect sketched a plan for a new community center. The architect inspected the foundation of a historic stone church. The architect selected limestone tiles for a museum lobby floor. The architect revised the blueprints for a waterfront apartment.

The photographer captured a sunset over the desert canyon. The photographer developed film in the basement darkroom. The photographer framed a portrait for the gallery exhibition. The photographer cleaned a vintage camera lens with a soft brush.

The mailman delivered a large box to the cottage by the lake. The mailman found an unaddressed letter in the collection bag. The mailman fixed the broken latch on a roadside mailbox. The mailman returned a misdelivered package to the post office.

The miller ground a sack of wheat into fine white flour. The miller oiled the main axle of the old water wheel. The miller swept grain dust off the stone mill floor. The miller loaded bags of cornmeal onto a wooden cart.

The fisherman mended a torn net on the dock. The fisherman painted the hull of a small wooden boat. The fisherman sold a basket of fresh cod at the market. The fisherman replaced a rusty hook on the main fishing line.

The ranger cleared a fallen log from the mountain trail. The ranger tagged a young deer for the wildlife survey. The ranger repaired a damaged trail marker near the summit. The ranger recorded water levels at the forest creek station.

The professor graded a tall stack of research papers. The professor organized slides for a geology lecture. The professor donated old textbooks to the department library. The professor calibrated a microscope in the science laboratory.

The nurse administered a flu vaccine at the community clinic. The nurse restocked bandages in the supply closet. The nurse recorded patient information in a paper chart. The nurse cleaned the examination table in room four.

The chef prepared a mushroom soup for the evening guests. The chef sharpened a set of kitchen knives at the station. The chef organized spices on the wooden rack above the stove. The chef tasted a sample of the new tomato sauce recipe.

The electrician wired a new outlet in the basement wall. The electrician replaced a faulty breaker in the main panel. The electrician installed a ceiling fan in the master bedroom. The electrician tested the ground connection at the back porch.

The plumber unclogged a drain in the kitchen sink. The plumber replaced a worn gasket on the bathroom faucet. The plumber insulated exposed pipes in the crawl space. The plumber installed a new water heater in the utility closet.

The librarian cataloged a collection of donated novels. The librarian repaired a torn spine on an encyclopedia volume. The librarian organized a summer reading program for children. The librarian shelved returned books in the nonfiction section.

The butcher trimmed a rack of lamb for a customer. The butcher sharpened the main cutting knife on a whetstone. The butcher wrapped a pork roast in brown paper. The butcher cleaned the wooden chopping block with salt and lemon.

The barber cut a young boy's hair with electric clippers. The barber swept loose hair off the tile floor. The barber sharpened a straight razor on a leather strop. The barber hung a new mirror on the back wall of the shop.

The locksmith copied a brass key for the apartment tenant. The locksmith repaired a jammed deadbolt on the office door. The locksmith installed a new padlock on the storage shed. The locksmith opened a stuck car door with a slim metal tool.

The veterinarian examined a limping golden retriever. The veterinarian vaccinated a litter of kittens against rabies. The veterinarian cleaned a wound on the front leg of a horse. The veterinarian prescribed medication for an older gray cat.

The bricklayer built a low retaining wall along the driveway. The bricklayer repaired a crumbling chimney on the old farmhouse. The bricklayer laid a herringbone pattern on the garden patio. The bricklayer mixed a fresh batch of mortar in a steel bucket.

The winemaker crushed a barrel of dark purple grapes. The winemaker tested the sugar content of the new harvest. The winemaker sealed oak barrels with fresh wooden plugs. The winemaker labeled bottles of the previous vintage for shipment.

The sculptor chiseled a face from a block of white marble. The sculptor welded iron rods into a tall abstract frame. The sculptor molded wet clay into the shape of a horse. The sculptor sanded the surface of a wooden figure smooth.

The sailor tied a thick rope to the dock cleat. The sailor scrubbed the wooden deck with a stiff brush. The sailor patched a small tear in the canvas sail. The sailor coiled a long anchor line on the bow.

The teacher corrected spelling mistakes in the essay stack. The teacher arranged desks into a circle for group discussion. The teacher pinned student artwork on the classroom bulletin board. The teacher labeled supply bins in the hallway storage closet.

The clerk stamped a passport at the immigration counter. The clerk filed a stack of insurance forms in the cabinet. The clerk answered a phone call about office hours. The clerk refilled the paper tray in the office printer.

The dancer rehearsed a solo routine on the wooden stage. The dancer sewed a loose sequin on a costume jacket. The dancer polished a pair of black tap shoes. The dancer signed a poster for a young fan at the entrance.

The geologist collected rock samples from the river canyon. The geologist measured the depth of a limestone cave. The geologist labeled fossils in the university research lab. The geologist mapped fault lines across the mountain ridge.

The astronomer observed a meteor shower through the dome telescope. The astronomer recorded data from a distant star cluster. The astronomer cleaned the main lens of the observatory telescope. The astronomer published findings about a newly mapped comet.

The birdwatcher spotted a rare falcon near the sea cliffs. The birdwatcher recorded a woodpecker call in the forest. The birdwatcher photographed a heron at the edge of the marsh. The birdwatcher sketched a robin perched on a birch branch.

The postmaster weighed a heavy parcel on the brass scale. The postmaster locked the back storage room for inventory. The postmaster stamped a registered letter with a red seal. The postmaster sorted a bag of international letters into delivery bins.

The woodcarver shaped a duck decoy from a block of cedar. The woodcarver oiled a set of chisels at the workbench. The woodcarver sanded the edges of a walnut picture frame. The woodcarver burned a decorative pattern into a pine box lid.

The zookeeper fed fresh fish to the penguins in the enclosure. The zookeeper repaired a loose board in the zebra fence. The zookeeper weighed the baby elephant at the veterinary station. The zookeeper cleaned the water filter in the flamingo pool.

The grocer stacked apples on the front produce display. The grocer replaced a price label on the canned soup shelf. The grocer swept the floor near the checkout counter. The grocer accepted a delivery of fresh bread from the bakery.

The mayor signed a permit for the new playground. The mayor opened a community garden on the east side of town. The mayor presented an award to a retiring school teacher. The mayor attended a ribbon-cutting at the renovated train station.

The coach drew a play on the locker room whiteboard. The coach timed the sprinters on the outdoor track. The coach carried a bag of soccer balls to the field. The coach filled water bottles for the practice session.

The silversmith polished a tarnished candlestick to a bright shine. The silversmith repaired a dented silver serving tray. The silversmith engraved a monogram on a small dessert spoon. The silversmith hammered a flat sheet of silver into a bowl shape.

The toymaker carved a wooden horse on a small lathe. The toymaker painted a set of building blocks bright colors. The toymaker attached felt ears to a stuffed cotton bear. The toymaker glued wheels onto a miniature red wagon.

The innkeeper set fresh flowers on the front reception desk. The innkeeper replaced the curtains in the upstairs guest room. The innkeeper cleared a fallen branch from the gravel parking area. The innkeeper polished the brass door handles at the main entrance.

The apothecary measured dried herbs on a small brass scale. The apothecary labeled glass jars of chamomile and mint. The apothecary ground cinnamon bark with a stone mortar and pestle. The apothecary wrapped a package of lavender sachets in tissue paper.

The lifeguard pulled a struggling swimmer from the deep end. The lifeguard restocked the first aid kit under the tower. The lifeguard adjusted the lane dividers in the competition pool. The lifeguard cleaned sunscreen residue off the poolside handrails.

The truck driver delivered lumber to the construction site. The truck driver changed a flat tire on the highway shoulder. The truck driver loaded crates of oranges at the warehouse. The truck driver washed mud off the trailer at the truck stop.

The park ranger counted bison in the eastern valley. The park ranger repainted a trail sign near the waterfall. The park ranger collected water samples from the mountain stream. The park ranger replaced batteries in the wildlife camera.

The basket weaver soaked willow rods in a trough of water. The basket weaver wove a round storage basket with a handle. The basket weaver trimmed loose ends off a rectangular bread tray. The basket weaver dyed reed strips with walnut shell extract.

The window washer cleaned the top floor of the office building. The window washer replaced a frayed safety harness strap. The window washer removed a bird nest from a window ledge. The window washer tightened bolts on the scaffolding platform.

The surveyor measured the boundary line of the farm property. The surveyor planted a metal stake at the northeast corner. The surveyor recorded elevation data on the hillside lot. The surveyor drew a new plot map for the county records.

The saxophone player performed a jazz solo at the waterfront cafe. The saxophone player purchased a box of reeds from the music store. The saxophone player polished the brass body of the instrument. The saxophone player recorded a track at the downtown sound studio.

The chimney sweep cleaned a fireplace flue at a country cottage. The chimney sweep repaired a cracked chimney cap on an old farmhouse. The chimney sweep removed a bird nest from a restaurant exhaust vent. The chimney sweep replaced a rusted damper in a brick townhouse.

The grape farmer pruned vines in the hillside vineyard. The grape farmer mended a stone wall along the property border. The grape farmer oiled the gears of the old irrigation pump. The grape farmer built a scarecrow from straw and old clothes.
